ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "series_title" TEXT /* Title of the film series */,
  "released_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or synopsis of the film */,
  "meta_score" INTEGER /* Meta score of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the film */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the IMDB rating */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Production budget of the film */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Full name of the star */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the star */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the star */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the star */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the star's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_stars" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the star in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, film analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred genre */,
  "favorite_films" TEXT /* List of favorite films */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_viewing_history" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewed film */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the film was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the film */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "genre_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the film in its genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)
column_names: Runtime of the film in minutes
Overview or synopsis of the film
ID of the director of the film
Number of votes for the IMDB rating
URL of the star's profile picture
Role of the star in the film
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, film analyst)
ID of the user who posted the review
ID of the film being reviewed
ID of the film that received the award
Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director)
Number of votes for the film
Performance of the film in its genre
